title: Rothchild
writer: E.R. Escalmel, Jean Guitton, Paul Laffitte
actors: Harry Baur, Fred Pasquali, Christian Casadesus
plot: A homeless man named Rothchild is mistaken for a member of the wealthy Rothschild banking family. An unscrupulous banker makes him a bank president as part of a scheme to defraud depositors and investors.
